sv-playbook is a general runtime for operating AI-agent software delivery across projects, roles, models, and providers. Teams delegate agent coordination, deterministic enforcement, operational state, recovery, and delivery flow to the runtime while semantic product and engineering judgment remain explicitly owned by configured human and agent roles. The methodology, role charters, and verifier are components of this runtime, not the complete product.
